description_long: This object is a flintlock-style pistol with a smooth, dark wooden grip and barrel, featuring a classic, slightly curved handle. The lock mechanism and trigger assembly are made of dark metal, with visible hammer, frizzen, and trigger guard components. The barrel is relatively short and round, with a simple, unadorned muzzle and no visible modern attachments or sights. The grip is smoothly contoured, blending seamlessly into the barrel, and lacks any checkering or texturing. The trigger guard is a thin, rounded metal loop, and the lock plate displays some subtle metallic detailing. There are no visible engravings, logos, or modern embellishments, giving the pistol a historical and utilitarian appearance.
description: A classic flintlock pistol with a smooth wooden grip, short round barrel, and simple metal lock mechanism. The design is unadorned and evokes a historical, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden grip, metal lock mechanism, and trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round barrel muzzle and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip contour and lock mechanism from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the top of the barrel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is smoothly contoured and crafted from dark wood, with a gentle curve that fits comfortably in the hand. Its surface is polished and lacks any checkering, stippling, or visible ergonomic finger grooves. There are no logos, embellishments, or decorative elements present, giving it a simple, utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is a thin, rounded metal loop with a smooth finish and moderate thickness. It is traditionally curved, without any undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories. The design is plain and functional, with no visible reinforcement or texturing.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short, round, and smooth, with no threading, porting, or external features such as compensators or suppressor threads. Its exterior is unadorned, with a consistent dark finish and no visible markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or barrel. The surfaces are plain and free of manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: There is no visible magazine base or floorplate, as this is a flintlock-style pistol with a single-shot design. The grip terminates in a rounded wooden end with no extensions, bevels, flares, finger rests, logos, or texturing.
